category: Ambient Audio References for Cretaceous Hub Area
description: Curated Freesound references for prehistoric jungle daytime atmosphere. These complement the Lumen-lit hub clearing at world coords X=2100, Y=2400.

sounds.name: Birds and bugs in the woods of Costa Rica
sounds.description: Dense tropical bird and insect ambience — closest analog to Cretaceous jungle soundscape. Daytime field recording from Osa Peninsula.
sounds.usage: Primary hub clearing loop — layer under all other sounds at the (2100, 2400) clearing

sounds.name: Peruvian Amazon birds frogs daytime
sounds.description: Upland forest recording with exotic birds and frogs — excellent for dense prehistoric jungle feel.
sounds.usage: Secondary layer for deep forest areas away from hub clearing

sounds.name: Forest Insects Day High Frequency
sounds.description: Clean high-frequency insect calls — cicadas and similar. Adds heat and density to midday atmosphere.
sounds.usage: Midday intensity layer — volume peaks at 12:00 in day/night cycle, fades at dawn/dusk

sounds.name: Forest Ambience Madagascar Rainforest
sounds.description: Tropical rainforest daytime ambience from Madagascar — rich biodiversity soundscape.
sounds.usage: Fallback ambient loop for areas without specific sound placement

lighting_context.fill_light: PointLight at (2100, 2400, 300) — 5000 intensity, warm white, no shadows

ue5_implementation_notes.audio_component: UAudioComponent with attenuation settings per sound
ue5_implementation_notes.metasound_integration: Agent #16 (Audio Agent) should import these as MetaSound sources
ue5_implementation_notes.day_night_modulation: Insect sounds peak at noon, bird calls peak at dawn/dusk, all fade at night
ue5_implementation_notes.reverb_preset: Jungle — high early reflections, long tail for dense canopy
ue5_implementation_notes.bridge_status: BRIDGE_DOWN — UE5 commands queued but not executed (timeout). Audio placement deferred to next bridge-up cycle.
